overview: Save Shop System is a comprehensive mobile-first shop management app with ICP backend storage. Features include inventory management with FIFO batching, billing and invoicing, credit/udhaar tracking, staff performance analytics, profit calculations, dead stock alerts, returns management, and a professional 7-section dashboard with real-time business insights.
features: Professional 7-section mobile dashboard with priority layout
Top Summary bar: Today Sales, Cash, UPI, Today Profit
Critical Alerts section: High Due Customers, Out of Stock, Over Sell
Stock Control: Low Stock, Out of Stock, Stock Value
Payment Control: Udhaar Top Customers with reminder actions
Smart Insights: Most Selling Products, High Profit Items, Low Price Alerts
Inventory Health: Expiry Alerts, Dead Stock, Slow Moving Items
Credit/Udhaar tracking with Mark as Paid
Staff performance and credit risk analytics
ICP cloud backend — persists across devices
Smart selling price system with staff bonus
